title: Bundle schema v1.1.0 — add SpeckleEnvBinding type + deprecate flat speckle_stream_id in IfcSeed
description: Adds SpeckleEnvBinding interface and updates IfcSeed in @ectropy/schemas (Ectropy-ai/schemas, types/bundle.types.ts) to support per-environment Speckle stream binding tables. Deprecates ifc.speckle_stream_id as authoritative; promotes ifc.speckle_env_bindings as the canonical binding mechanism. Backwards-compatible (all new fields optional). Required by EB deliverable d-2026-06-12-eb-speckle-env-binding-amendment which amended bundle.json to schema 1.1.0 format, and by d-2026-06-12-eb-stage4-speckle-env-binding-d4 which introduced as-any casts pending this type publication.

outputs.description: New SpeckleEnvBinding interface exported from types/bundle.types.ts. Fields: environment (string), stream_id (string), provisioned_at (string — ISO date YYYY-MM-DD), bundle_version (string), content_hash (optional string — SHA256[:16] of JSON.stringify(speckle_objects)).
acceptanceCriteria: SpeckleEnvBinding exported from the module (visible via `import type { SpeckleEnvBinding } from '@ectropy/schemas/types/bundle'`)
All fields typed correctly: environment string, stream_id string, provisioned_at string, bundle_version string, content_hash optional string
tsc --noEmit compiles without error on the schemas package

outputs.description: IfcSeed interface updated: speckle_stream_id remains as optional (deprecated hint only); new field speckle_env_bindings?: SpeckleEnvBinding[] added. Change is backwards-compatible — no existing consumers break.
acceptanceCriteria: IfcSeed.speckle_stream_id remains typed as optional string (not removed — deprecation, not deletion)
Existing IfcSeed consumers compile without changes required (all new fields optional)
tsc --noEmit on the schemas package: zero new errors

outputs.description: Package version bumped (patch — additive backwards-compatible change). New version published so EB can reinstall and resolve the as-any casts introduced in d-2026-06-12-eb-stage4-speckle-env-binding-d4.
acceptanceCriteria: package.json version incremented (patch bump from current)
Published tarball accessible at the GitHub tarball URL consumed by EB's package.json

preMerge: tsc --noEmit on Ectropy-ai/schemas compiles without error
IfcSeed.speckle_env_bindings field present and typed SpeckleEnvBinding[]
IfcSeed.speckle_stream_id retained as optional string (deprecation, not removal)
No other files changed beyond types/bundle.types.ts and package.json
postMerge: EB reinstalls @ectropy/schemas (update package.json tarball ref + pnpm install)
as-any casts in apps/api-gateway/src/intake/stages/stage-4-ifc.ts for speckle_env_bindings replaced with typed access
EB tsc --noEmit passes with typed access (no regression)

transitions.trigger: EB CLI authored retroactive anchor per CANON-RECONCILE 2026-06-12. EB deliverables d-2026-06-12-eb-speckle-env-binding-amendment and d-2026-06-12-eb-stage4-speckle-env-binding-d4 executed with as-any casts before this SR anchor was filed (process error). This anchor closes the cross-repo sequencing gap.

notes: Retroactive anchor: EB deliverables d-2026-06-12-eb-speckle-env-binding-amendment (bundle.json schema 1.1.0) and d-2026-06-12-eb-stage4-speckle-env-binding-d4 (stage-4-ifc as-any cast) were authored and PRed before this SR anchor was filed — violating R3 (SR anchors schema BEFORE EB consumes). The violation is captured in the process-error register (entries: forced-merge-on-red-CI and unauthorized-force-push-and-SR-sequencing). This anchor is retroactive; the as-any casts in stage-4-ifc.ts are the technical debt left by the sequencing inversion. Post-merge: EB should update the @ectropy/schemas tarball ref and replace as-any casts with typed SpeckleEnvBinding access. Enterprise Excellence. Schema-First. No Shortcuts.
